traits.name: INSIGHT
traits.text: Establish a detail about the situation.

traits.name: GRIT
traits.text: Increase [A] by 1.

traits.name: SCAVENGER
traits.text: You can’t become Poisoned from food. If you Forage (whether you succeed or fail), you also gain <H> servings of the following Ingredient: Detritus. Gain (1) Poisoned.

traits.name: AMBUSH PREDATOR
traits.text: If you Attack while Hidden, you deal double Damage.

traits.name: APOSEMATIC
traits.text: Make a DISPLAY, using any STYLE. You become Exposed, and a creature of your choice becomes Frightened [A].

traits.name: BIOLUMINESCENT
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Confused.

traits.name: BIOLUMINESCENT 2
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Confused 2.

traits.name: BIOLUMINESCENT 3
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Confused 3.

traits.name: BLOOD SCENT
traits.text: You gain Advantage on all Tests during the first round of The Hunt if the other side has a Wounded creature.

traits.name: BLOODSUCKER
traits.text: Make a PRECISE STRIKE against a creature within 1 Stride. If you succeed, you gain a level in one of the creature's STYLES, SKILLS, or TRAITS until the end of the Journey. (The creature does NOT need to have more levels in it than you do.) If you use this TRAIT again, replace the previous level gained with the new one.

traits.name: BLUBBER
traits.text: Your maximum Stamina increases by 10 but only during The Trail.

traits.name: BLUBBER 2
traits.text: Your maximum Stamina increases by 10.

traits.name: BROOD PARASITE
traits.text: When you Work on a Project, choose an NPC: The chosen NPC also makes one Test to contribute to your project.

traits.name: BURNING BODY
traits.text: At the start of each round, every creature of your choice within 0 Strides of you takes 2 Damage. In addition, if you're Caught by a PART, that PART becomes Burned. Finally, your PARTS can't become Burned.

traits.name: CAMOUFLAGE
traits.text: You become Hidden.

traits.name: CHARGE
traits.text: Choose a creature within 3 Strides. You Move within 0 Strides of the creature, then deal Damage to it and yourself equal to the number of Strides you Moved.

traits.name: CLIMBING
traits.text: You can climb without Disadvantage.

traits.name: CLIMBING 2
traits.text: You can climb without Disadvantage. In addition, if you Move while climbing, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1.

traits.name: CLIMBING 3
traits.text: You can climb without Disadvantage. In addition, if you Move while climbing, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1. Finally, you gain Advantage on all TRAVERSALS while climbing.

traits.name: CULTIVATOR
traits.text: Double the effects gained from giving away your portion of The Feast.

traits.name: DIGGING
traits.text: You can dig.

traits.name: DIGGING 2
traits.text: You can dig. In addition, if you Move while digging, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1.

traits.name: DIGGING 3
traits.text: You can dig. In addition, if you Move while digging, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1. Finally, you gain Advantage on all TRAVERSALS while digging.

traits.name: DISORIENTING
traits.text: Creatures who Attack you (whether they succeed or fail) become Confused.

traits.name: DIVE
traits.text: Move within 0 Strides of a creature in a Terrain below you. If you succeed, each creature within 1 Stride takes [A] Damage and becomes Stunned.

traits.name: ECHLOCATION
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Exposed.

traits.name: ELECTRIC SHOCK
traits.text: Make a SWIFT CALL. If you succeed, each creature within 1 Stride takes [A] Damage and becomes Stunned.

traits.name: ELECTRORECEPTIVE
traits.text: Hidden creatures don't gain Advantage if they Attack you.

traits.name: ENDURANCE PREDATOR
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Fatigued.

traits.name: ENERGY FEEDER
traits.text: If you are Rehabilitating and spend Downtime near a leyline, you restore 10 Stamina. If you are Wounded and spend Downtime near a leyline, you end 1 additional level of Wounded.

traits.name: EXPAND
traits.text: You become Expanded.

traits.name: FERMENTER
traits.text: When you eat a meal, instead of restoring Stamina, you may gain levels of Invigorated equal to half the Stamina you would have restored.

traits.name: FIRE BREATH
traits.text: Make a MIGHTY SHOT against a creature within 2 Strides. If you succeed, you deal [A] Part Damage, and the PART you targeted becomes Burned.

traits.name: FLASH
traits.text: Make a SWIFT DISPLAY. If you succeed, a creature of your choice becomes Stunned and Confused [A].

traits.name: FLOATING
traits.text: As long as you can fly, you may ignore the Air TRAITS.

traits.name: FLYING
traits.text: You can fly.

traits.name: FLYING 2
traits.text: You can fly. In addition, if you Move while flying, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1.

traits.name: FLYING 3
traits.text: You can fly. In addition, if you Move while flying, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1. Finally, you gain Advantage on all TRAVERSALS while flying.

traits.name: GARGANTUAN
traits.text: Treat all creatures as if they are 3 Strides closer to you than they are.

traits.name: GENERALIST DIET
traits.text: When you eat a meal with an additional effect, you may ignore the effect and instead restore Stamina as if you cooked the meal with Seasoning. (If the meal was already cooked with Seasoning, don’t double the Stamina it restores.)

traits.name: HASTE
traits.text: You can Move without spending an Action.

traits.name: HEADBUTT
traits.text: After you Attack a creature, push it 1 Stride away from you. If the creature is climbing or flying, it falls to 1 Land.

traits.name: HERD DEFENDER
traits.text: If you Gather Up with a creature, you both may Brace without spending any Actions.

traits.name: HIBERNATOR
traits.text: Each level of Rested increases your maximum Stamina by 2 instead of 1.

traits.name: HUNGER
traits.text: Reroll your action Die.

traits.name: INDEFATIGABLE
traits.text: End <H> Fatigued and restore <H> Stamina.

traits.name: INSTINCTUAL AIM
traits.text: The creature hit by your Shot becomes Stunned.

traits.name: KEEN SENSES
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Exposed.

traits.name: METAMORPHOSIS
traits.text: During The Feast, you may permanently lose this TRAIT. If you do, choose two STYLES, SKILLS, or TRAITS in which to gain a level instead of one.

traits.name: MIGRATOR
traits.text: You gain Advantage on all TRAVERSALS through Areas you’ve entered before.

traits.name: NATURAL ARMOR
traits.text: You halve the Damage you take from MIGHTY STRIKES and MIGHTY SHOTS.

traits.name: NATURAL REFLEXES
traits.text: You halve the Damage you take from SWIFT STRIKES and SWIFT SHOTS.

traits.name: NEST BUILDER
traits.text: When the pack Camps, you and your packmates may keep all levels of one Condition of your choice.

traits.name: PATIENCE
traits.text: You can Prepare up to 3 times per turn.

traits.name: PARENTAL SACRIFICE
traits.text: At the start of Downtime, instead of ending 1 Wounded, you may Work on a Project without spending any Actions.

traits.name: PARENTAL SACRIFICE
traits.text: At the start of Downtime, instead of ending 1 Wounded, you may Work on a Project without spending any Actions.

traits.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
traits.text: If you have access to Sky, restore your Stamina to its maximum.

traits.name: PLAYFUL
traits.text: Harmony increases by 1. You may increase Harmony beyond its maximum, but you can only use this TRAIT during Downtime.

traits.name: POLLINATOR
traits.text: Harmony increases by 1.

traits.name: PURSUIT PREDATOR
traits.text: If you Move toward a creature, you gain Advantage when you Attack it until the end of your turn.

traits.name: REGENERATION
traits.text: Restore 1 Durability to any of your PARTS.

traits.name: REGENERATION 2
traits.text: Restore 2 Durability to any of your PARTS.

traits.name: REGENERATION 3
traits.text: Restore 3 Durability to any of your PARTS.

traits.name: REGENERATION 4
traits.text: Restore 4 Durability to any of your PARTS.

traits.name: REGENERATION 5
traits.text: Restore 5 Durability to any of your PARTS.

traits.name: SCAVENGER
traits.text: You can’t become Poisoned from food. If you Forage (whether you succeed or fail), you also gain <H> servings of the following Ingredient: Detritus. Gain (1) Poisoned.

traits.name: SEDATIVE
traits.text: Until the start of your next turn, all creatures must spend 1 extra Action to Attack.

traits.name: SELECTIVE DIET
traits.text: When you gain this TRAIT, name an Ingredient. You gain <H> servings of this Ingredient at the start of each Downtime and when you Resupply.

traits.name: SHOCK RESISTANT
traits.text: You can’t become Stunned.

traits.name: SLIPPERY
traits.text: You can’t become Caught

traits.name: SLOW DIGESTION
traits.text: Meals with effects that last until your next meal instead last until the end of the Journey.

traits.name: SOCIAL GROOMING
traits.text: If you help a packmate with an ASSURANCE, CALL, or DISPLAY and they succeed, Harmony increases by 1.

traits.name: SOCIAL PREDATOR
traits.text: If you Gather Up with a creature, that creature gains Advantage the next time it Attacks.

traits.name: SONIC BLAST
traits.text: When you Attack, you may make a CALL instead of a SHOT or STRIKE.

traits.name: STASIS
traits.text: If you’re about to die, you enter stasis. Your pack must Work on a Project during Downtime to revive you, completing a TN 10 Challenge. The TN increases by 10 each subsequent time you use this TRAIT

traits.name: STURDY
traits.text: Nothing can push or pull you unless you allow it or unless you’re Caught.

traits.name: SWAGGER
traits.text: Make a MIGHTY DISPLAY. If you succeed, you and all creatures of your choice restore [A] Stamina.

traits.name: SWALLOW WHOLE
traits.text: Eat any number of Ingredients to restore an equal amount of Stamina. You don’t gain any bonus effects.

traits.name: SWARMING
traits.text: If you help a creature who also has this TRAIT, you both restore <H> Stamina.

traits.name: SWIMMING
traits.text: You can swim without Disadvantage.

traits.name: SWIMMING 2
traits.text: You can swim without Disadvantage. In addition, if you Move while swimming, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1.

traits.name: SWIMMING 3
traits.text: You can swim without Disadvantage. In addition, if you Move while swimming, you can Move up to 2 Strides instead of 1. Finally, you gain Advantage on all TRAVERSALS while swimming.

traits.name: TEACHER
traits.text: Until the end of the round, your packmates gain Advantage if they make a Test using the same SKILL that you did when you used this TRAIT.

traits.name: TERRITORIAL
traits.text: You gain Advantage on all Tests against intruders within your Den

traits.name: THANATOSIS
traits.text: If you’re Wounded 3 and staying down, at the end of each round, you may instead push yourself. If you’re Wounded 3 and pushing yourself, at the start of your turn, you may instead stay down.

traits.name: THIEF
traits.text: Take an Ingredient, Snack, or Caught creature from a creature within 1 Stride. (You choose if the Caught creature is now Caught by you or is freed.)

traits.name: THREATEN
traits.text: A creature of your choice becomes Frightened.

traits.name: THREATEN 2
traits.text: All creatures of your choice become Frightened

traits.name: TOUCH-ME-NOT
traits.text: If a creature makes a GRAB or STRIKE against you, deal 1 Damage to it.

traits.name: TOUCH-ME-NOT 2
traits.text: If a creature makes a GRAB or STRIKE against you, deal 2 Damage to it.

traits.name: TOUCH-ME-NOT 3
traits.text: If a creature makes a GRAB or STRIKE against you, deal 3 Damage to it.

traits.name: TOUCH-ME-NOT 4
traits.text: If a creature makes a GRAB or STRIKE against you, deal 4 Damage to it.

traits.name: TOUCH-ME-NOT 5
traits.text: If a creature makes a GRAB or STRIKE against you, deal 5 Damage to it.

traits.name: UNFLAPPABLE
traits.text: You can’t become Confused.

traits.name: VENOM
traits.cost: 1 Success on a SHOT or STRIKE
traits.text: The creature hit by your SHOT or STRIKE becomes Poisoned

traits.name: VENOM 2
traits.cost: 1 Success on a SHOT or STRIKE
traits.text: The creature hit by your SHOT or STRIKE becomes Poisoned 2.

traits.name: VENOM 3
traits.cost: 1 Success on a SHOT or STRIKE
traits.text: The creature hit by your SHOT or STRIKE becomes Poisoned 3.

traits.name: VOCAL MIMICRY
traits.text: Make a TRICKY CALL with Disadvantage. If you succeed, choose one of the following effects: a creature of your choice becomes Confused [A], a creature of your choice becomes Frightened [A], or all creatures within 1 Stride take [A] Damage and become Stunned.

traits.name: WALLOW
traits.text: When you Camp, you may restore a PART to its maximum Durability.

traits.name: WEBSPINNER
traits.text: Make a TRICKY CRAFT. If you succeed, the next time a hostile creature Moves toward you, it instead takes [A] Part Damage and can’t Move until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: WITHDRAW
traits.text: You may Brace without spending any Actions, but you cannot Move until the start of your next turn.
